title: Reproduce complete Durable Ledger State
preconditions: Representative Ledger containing every durable state type, including evidence, deterministic and owner reconciliation, exceptions, pools, payment attribution, assigned and unassigned cases, active and retired history, and exact derived baselines.
steps: Create and independently verify a backup; restore into an empty generation; compare normalized manifests, per-type counts, evidence and decision links, assignments, exact pool/category totals, history, cardinality rules, and idempotency outcomes; activate; repeat with corrupt, incomplete, incompatible, and faulted candidates.
expected: Accepted drills reproduce complete Durable Ledger State and every exact baseline; rejected drills never change CURRENT; prior state remains the recovery point.
